description_long: This is a soft, white grocery bag with a slightly irregular, pillow-like shape, suggesting it is made from a flexible material such as cloth or thick paper. The bag appears to be partially filled, giving it a bulging form, and there is a prominent, twisted handle or strap on one side, which looks sturdy and functional. Faint, handwritten or printed text is visible on one side of the bag, though it is partially obscured and not fully legible. The surface of the bag is matte and slightly rough, with subtle creases and folds that indicate its pliability. The bag's opening is at the top, and it is wide enough to allow easy access to its contents. No groceries or items are visibly protruding from the bag, and the overall appearance suggests it is designed for carrying personal shopping items in an urban environment.
description: A soft, white, partially filled grocery bag with a twisted handle and faint printed text on one side. The bag has a matte, slightly rough surface and a top-facing opening.
description_view_0: The bag's back side is visible, showing a smooth, bulging surface with no handles or text apparent.
description_view_1: This view highlights the twisted handle and the bag's opening, as well as some faint text on the side.
description_view_2: The side with the most visible text and the twisted handle is shown, with the bag's opening partially visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the handle is visible, showing a smooth, slightly creased surface with a hint of text near the edge.
